articles.title: Jeremiah Louis released from hospital but will continue to be monitored
articles.description: Jeremiah Louis was rushed to hospital after being felled by a Jayden Seales delivery in a West Indies Championship match, which was then called off because of a "dangerous pitch"

articles.title: ICC calls Knight Riders' MLC base in Pomona 'cricket's home for LA28'
articles.description: The venue at Fairplex will serve as Los Angeles Knight Riders' home venue at MLC 2026 and is expected to be the primary venue for cricket at the 2028 Olympic Games

articles.title: Ed Smith joins ECB board as non-executive director
articles.description: Former national selector returns to governing body in place of outgoing Baroness Zahida Manzoor

articles.title: Nawaz under investigation after positive test for recreational drug use
articles.description: ESPNcricinfo has learned the positive result comes from testing during T20 World Cup earlier this year

articles.title: Jude Bellingham buys minority stake in Hundred franchise Birmingham Phoenix
articles.description: Real Madrid star and Birmingham City graduate invests approx £1 million in home city club

articles.title: Wasim Khan to step down as ICC's general manager
articles.description: His impending exit follows the departure of several senior ICC officials over the last two years

articles.title: Shanaka banned from PSL for one year for IPL switch
articles.description: Shanaka opted out of a contract with Lahore Qalandars and later joined IPL team Rajasthan Royals

articles.title: Former Afghanistan quick Shapoor Zadran battles for his life in Delhi hospital
articles.description: Shapoor Zadran is suffering from Hemophagocytic Lymphohistiocytosis (HLH), a rare, life-threatening disease, in which the immune system starts failing

articles.title: Five UAE cricketers given citizenship through naturalisation
articles.description: Khuzaima Tanveer, Ajay Kumar, Akshdeep Nath, Harpreet Bhatia and Adeeb Usmani are the players with UAE citizenship

articles.title: 'Incredibly excessive' - Blessing Muzarabani's agent on PSL ban
articles.description: The agent denied that a binding agreement between the league and the player had been reached before Muzarabani ultimately opted to sign a contract with the IPL

articles.title: Three Pondicherry cricketers suspended for assaulting, attempting to murder team coach
articles.description: The said players are hereby suspended with immediate effect from all cricketing activities conducted under the aegis of CAP.

articles.title: [WATCH] Mohammed Shami takes two-in-two in LSG vs RR, puts strong case forward for international comeback
articles.description: LSG opted to bowl first against RR in Match 32.

articles.title: 'Not doing anything' - Alastair Cook asks RCB's Jacob Bethell to play in England due to lack of chances in IPL
articles.description: Bethell is yet to make a single appearance for the defending champions, with the RCB management firm on using Phil Salt, Tim David, Romario Shepherd and Josh Hazlewood as their four overseas players.
